title: Luda (KIFF 2026)
synopsis: Laqi's parents went missing in the forest. She goes there to look for them and gets lost. Luckily, a monster named Luda appears and leads her into the heart of the forest. Despite getting attacked by evil monsters, Laqi is determined to bring life back to the dying forest with her dad's crystal. That's the only way to save her parents. Meanwhile, Luda seems to be hiding something from Laqi.

synopsis_lang.en: Laqi's parents went missing in the forest. She goes there to look for them and gets lost. Luckily, a monster named Luda appears and leads her into the heart of the forest. Despite getting attacked by evil monsters, Laqi is determined to bring life back to the dying forest with her dad's crystal. That's the only way to save her parents. Meanwhile, Luda seems to be hiding something from Laqi.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk: 距今五十年後的近未來台灣，自然資源被人類破壞開發殆盡。僅剩下最後一片傳說中有魔神仔出沒的山林……科學家意外在這片山林裡，找到能通往另一個平行時空的森林入口：台灣傳說中的各種妖怪全都真實生活在這片奇幻森林裡！隨著人類破壞開發的腳步，妖怪們即將失去森林家園，眾多動植物學家紛紛投入研究搶救妖怪森林。然而，有一對科學家夫婦卻在森林裡神秘失蹤了！他們的女兒菈奇，則在魔神仔路達的協助下踏上尋親冒險…

subtitle: Chinese,English
